requirement_topic.en: EMC and Power Quality — IEC 62920, IEC 61000 Series, and GPL Power-Quality Review
requirement_topic.zh: EMC和电能质量——IEC 62920、IEC 61000系列及GPL电能质量审查
requirement_topic.zht: EMC和電能品質——IEC 62920、IEC 61000系列及GPL電能品質審查

summary.en: Guyana does not publish a solar-inverter-only EMC regulation in the same way some larger markets do. In practice, EMC and power-quality evidence should be assembled from IEC inverter standards and the applicable GPL interconnection or project specification. GPL's National Grid Code includes power-quality requirements intended to prevent generators from degrading waveform quality before interconnection. For PV inverters, IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment, while IEC 61000-series standards are commonly used for harmonic current emissions, immunity, flicker, and conducted/radiated EMC evidence.
summary.zh: 圭亚那并未像部分大型市场一样发布专门针对太阳能逆变器的独立EMC法规。实践中，EMC和电能质量证据应基于IEC逆变器标准以及适用的GPL并网或项目规格进行组合。GPL《国家电网规范》包含电能质量要求，旨在防止发电设施在并网前降低波形质量。对于光伏逆变器，IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备专用EMC标准；IEC 61000系列通常用于谐波电流排放、抗扰度、电压波动/闪变以及传导/辐射EMC证据。
summary.zht: 圭亞那並未像部分大型市場一樣發布專門針對太陽能逆變器的獨立EMC法規。實務中，EMC和電能品質證據應基於IEC逆變器標準以及適用的GPL併網或項目規格進行組合。GPL《國家電網規範》包含電能品質要求，旨在防止發電設施在併網前降低波形品質。對於光伏逆變器，IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備專用EMC標準；IEC 61000系列通常用於諧波電流排放、抗擾度、電壓波動/閃變以及傳導/輻射EMC證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions
IEC 61000-3-3 / IEC 61000-3-11 / IEC 61000-3-12 — voltage changes, flicker, and harmonic limits where applicable by equipment rating
GPL National Grid Code — power-quality requirements for generation interconnection
GNBS standards and conformity framework where adopted or required for imported electrical products

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly prepared under GB/T 37408 and related domestic GB/T or NB/T test references, with testing by CNAS-accredited laboratories. These reports may use IEC 61000-series methods but are normally framed for China's domestic certification and 50 Hz grid environment. They do not automatically meet IEC 62920, GPL project power-quality review, or GNBS import/conformity expectations for Guyana.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依据GB/T 37408及相关国内GB/T或NB/T测试引用准备，并由CNAS认可实验室测试。这些报告可能采用IEC 61000系列方法，但通常面向中国国内认证和50 Hz电网环境，并不能自动满足IEC 62920、GPL项目电能质量审查或圭亚那GNBS进口/合格评定预期。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依據GB/T 37408及相關國內GB/T或NB/T測試引用準備，並由CNAS認可實驗室測試。這些報告可能採用IEC 61000系列方法，但通常面向中國國內認證和50 Hz電網環境，並不能自動滿足IEC 62920、GPL項目電能品質審查或圭亞那GNBS進口/合格評定預期。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related requirements
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: A China-only EMC certificate should be supplemented with IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for the exact inverter model, power rating, firmware configuration, and grid setting. Harmonic and flicker results should be reviewed for Guyana's 60 Hz operating configuration and project point of interconnection. For larger GPL-connected or weak-grid projects, the project engineer may require additional harmonic studies, power-quality simulations, or mitigation equipment before interconnection approval.
gap.zh: 差距：仅中国EMC证书应补充覆盖特定逆变器型号、功率等级、固件配置和电网设置的IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列报告。谐波和闪变结果应针对圭亚那60 Hz运行配置及项目并网点进行审查。对于较大规模GPL并网或弱电网项目，项目工程师可能要求额外谐波研究、电能质量仿真或治理设备，方可批准并网。
gap.zht: 差距：僅中國EMC證書應補充覆蓋特定逆變器型號、功率等級、韌體配置和電網設置的IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列報告。諧波和閃變結果應針對圭亞那60 Hz運行配置及項目併網點進行審查。對於較大規模GPL併網或弱電網項目，項目工程師可能要求額外諧波研究、電能品質模擬或治理設備，方可批准併網。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice where required by GPL interconnection review, GNBS conformity/import review, or the project specification; exact IEC 61000 parts depend on inverter rating and connection conditions
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-dependent under China domestic certification practice; not transferable as Guyana EMC or power-quality acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T 37408 EMC evidence alone for Guyana. Assemble IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 reports, then confirm with GPL, GNBS, and the project engineer whether the reports cover the 60 Hz firmware profile and the actual point-of-interconnection conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅依赖中国GB/T 37408 EMC证据进入圭亚那。应准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000报告，并与GPL、GNBS和项目工程师确认报告是否覆盖60 Hz固件配置及实际并网点条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅依賴中國GB/T 37408 EMC證據進入圭亞那。應準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000報告，並與GPL、GNBS和項目工程師確認報告是否覆蓋60 Hz韌體配置及實際併網點條件。
